briefdescription.para: Finds best plane to approx given points.

simplesect.para: this ctor is public only for std::make_shared used inside clone()

detaileddescription.para: clones this object only, without its children, making new object the owner of all copied resources
clones this object only, without its children, making new object to share resources with this object

briefdescription.para: updates xf to fit given normal
updates xf to fit given center
calculates normalized directions of X,Y axis of the plane and normal as Z
Returns point considered as base for the feature.

detaileddescription.para: Since a point on an abstract feature is difficult to uniquely parameterize, the projection function simultaneously returns the normal to the surface at the projection point.

memberdef.definition: virtual MRMESH_API const std::vector< FeatureObjectSharedProperty > & MR::PlaneObject::getAllSharedProperties
memberdef.name: getAllSharedProperties

briefdescription.para: Create and generate list of bounded getters and setters for the main properties of feature object, together with prop. name for display and edit into UI.

detaileddescription.para:
Write parameters to given Json::Value,
if you override this method, please call Base::serializeFields_(root) in the beginning

memberdef.definition: virtual Expected< std::future< Expected< void > > > MR::PlaneObject::serializeModel_
memberdef.name: serializeModel_

detaileddescription.para: Creates future to save object model (e.g. mesh) in given file path is full filename without extension
each renderable child of VisualObject should implement this method and assign renderObj_ inside
